languages.original_text: "The hues of this place are so bright and monochromatic that they blind my eyes. Please, let us not linger here!"

languages.text: "Краски этого места столь ярки и монохромны, что слепят мне глаза. Прошу вас, давайте не будем задерживаться!"
languages.translation_comment: characters entered the medbay for the first time

languages.text: "The hues of this place are so bright and monochromatic that they blind my eyes. Please, let us not linger here!"
languages.original_text: "Краски этого места столь ярки и монохромны, что слепят мне глаза. Прошу вас, давайте не будем задерживаться!"

traits.locale_text: "The hues of this place are so bright and monochromatic that they blind my eyes. Please, let us not linger here!"
"The hues of this place are so bright and monochromatic that they blind my eyes. Please, let us not linger here!"
"The hues of this place are so bright and monochromatic that they blind my eyes. Please, let us not linger here!"

languages.text: 「この場所の色は鮮やかで単色で、私の目をくらますほどです。どうか、ここで長く滞在しないように！」
languages.original_text: "The hues of this place are so bright and monochromatic that they blind my eyes. Please, let us not linger here!"

traits.locale_text: 「この場所の色は鮮やかで単色で、私の目をくらますほどです。どうか、ここで長く滞在しないように！」

languages.text: « Les teintes de cet endroit sont si brillantes et monochromes qu'elles m'aveuglent. Je vous en prie, ne nous attardons pas ici ! »
languages.original_text: "The hues of this place are so bright and monochromatic that they blind my eyes. Please, let us not linger here!"

traits.locale_text: « Les teintes de cet endroit sont si brillantes et monochromes qu'elles m'aveuglent. Je vous en prie, ne nous attardons pas ici ! »

languages.text: "Die Farbtöne dieses Ortes sind so hell und monochrom, dass sie meine Augen blenden. Bitte, lasst uns hier nicht verweilen!"
languages.original_text: "The hues of this place are so bright and monochromatic that they blind my eyes. Please, let us not linger here!"

traits.locale_text: "Die Farbtöne dieses Ortes sind so hell und monochrom, dass sie meine Augen blenden. Bitte, lasst uns hier nicht verweilen!"

languages.text: "Burasının renkleri o kadar parlak ve tek renkli ki gözlerimi kör ediyor. Ne olur burada gereğinden fazla kalmayalım!"
languages.original_text: "The hues of this place are so bright and monochromatic that they blind my eyes. Please, let us not linger here!"

traits.locale_text: "Burasının renkleri o kadar parlak ve tek renkli ki gözlerimi kör ediyor. Ne olur burada gereğinden fazla kalmayalım!"

languages.text: «Las tonalidades de este lugar son tan intensas y monocromas que me ciegan. ¡Por favor, no nos demoremos más!».
languages.original_text: "The hues of this place are so bright and monochromatic that they blind my eyes. Please, let us not linger here!"

traits.locale_text: «Las tonalidades de este lugar son tan intensas y monocromas que me ciegan. ¡Por favor, no nos demoremos más!».

languages.text: “这地方的色调如此鲜明单一，刺得我眼睛发痛。求求你，我们快离开这里吧！”
languages.original_text: "The hues of this place are so bright and monochromatic that they blind my eyes. Please, let us not linger here!"

traits.locale_text: “这地方的色调如此鲜明单一，刺得我眼睛发痛。求求你，我们快离开这里吧！”
